title: notifications-mail — authorization policies
description: One policy on MailSuppression. HasSystemFlag enforces edit/delete refusal on is_system=true rows via the trait's global rule.

abilities.scope: tenant admin (creates tenant-scoped) OR super_admin (creates platform-wide with --platform-wide)
REFUSED when is_system=true (unless super_admin) OR reason IN hard_bounce/complaint (unless super_admin + explicit --force)
